title: Dev's Heart Pack
description: A resource pack that remakes the heart icons.
body:
❤️ **Dev's Heart Pack** – **Minecraft Resource Pack**

Give your health bar a total makeover with Dev's Heart Pack, a Minecraft resource pack that reimagines the classic heart icons with bold new visuals!

Each heart has been carefully redesigned to keep the vanilla feel while adding visual flair.

- 🖌️ _Fresh new heart icons for full, half, and empty states._
- 🩸 _Hardcore hearts included!_

Check out my [better wither hearts!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/devs-better-wither-hearts)
